org.arakhne.neteditor.io.xml

Interface XMLConstants

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    GraphMLConstants, GXLConstants
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractGraphMLReader, AbstractGXLReader, AbstractXMLReader, AbstractXMLWriter, GraphMLReader, GraphMLReader1, GraphMLReader2, GraphMLWriter, GXLReader, GXLReader1, GXLReader2, GXLWriter

    Constants for the XML tools.
